name: Creole Eggplant Souffle
recipeInstructions:
Firmly packed grated mild white cheese of your choice
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat until it foams. Add onion, celery, and garlic, sautéing until the onion is translucent. Stir in flour, cooking until well combined. Add herbs and cook until mixture begins to brown slightly. Incorporate milk and diced eggplant (about 1 1/2 lbs). Cover and simmer over low heat, stirring occasionally, until eggplant is tender. Add a small amount of water if needed to keep the bottom moist.
Remove from heat. Transfer mixture to mixing bowl. Combine bread crumbs, grated cheese, salt and pepper, cayenne, and 3 egg yolks. In another bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form; gently fold into eggplant mixture. Pour into well-oiled 1 1/2 quart baking casserole or souffle pan.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until puffed and golden brown. Allow to rest briefly before serving. Serves 4-6.
